blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and target supply chain schemas, OPTIONS statement
DATA step computing delivery metrics from purchase orders: lead time in days, delivery variance vs promised date, on-time delivery flag, and quality acceptance flag
PROC SQL aggregating supplier performance scorecard: average lead time, on-time delivery rate, quality rate, and total spend by supplier with minimum order threshold
PROC SORT ordering inventory transactions by product_id and transaction_date for downstream backorder tracking
DATA step with RETAIN tracking cumulative backorder levels per product: accumulates demand, reduces on receipt, and flags CRITICAL/WARNING/OK alert levels against reorder points
PROC MEANS computing demand variability statistics (mean and standard deviation of daily quantity) by product for safety stock calculation
DATA step computing safety stock using service level z-score formula, reorder points, and ABC classification using arrays for revenue-based thresholds with review cycle assignment
PROC SORT filtering and ordering product classification for A-class items with high safety stock for exception reporting
TITLE statement and PROC PRINT generating formatted exception report for high safety stock A-class items with descriptive labels
